provenance.forward: src.forward.run.run_forward(..., return_paths=True) — re-implemented inline so daily series are retained per path

aggregation.lmp_usd_per_mwh_monthly_mean: per-path: groupby(month).mean of lmp_daily; across paths: weighted_quantile(P10/P50/P90) at each month
aggregation.henry_hub_usd_per_mmbtu_monthly_mean: per-path: groupby(month).mean of gas_daily; across paths: weighted_quantile(P10/P50/P90) at each month
aggregation.generation_mwh_monthly_sum: per-path: groupby(month).sum of daily.mwh_degraded; across paths: weighted_quantile(P10/P50/P90) at each month
aggregation.gross_margin_usd_monthly_sum: per-path: groupby(month).sum of daily.margin_degraded; across paths: weighted_quantile(P10/P50/P90) at each month
aggregation.net_pl_cdf: real per-path annual Net P&L sorted, cumulative SEAS5 probability
aggregation.temperature_f_daily: SEAS5 51-member ensemble daily P10/P50/P90 from data/paths/lockport/weather_forecast_seas5.json (the conditioning signal)
